required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs

reference_templates.title: List item fields

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Reference DOM (Duplicate name attributes): Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild) Reference DOM (Triple nested fieldsets): Fieldset inside fieldset inside fieldset with legends at each level Reference DOM (List item fields): Each field wrapped in li inside ul list structure Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: readonly-prefill, glued-label-text, details-accordion, split-phone, pill-yes-no. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: sidebar + main split apply layout. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Duplicate name attributes; Triple nested fieldsets; List item fields.
